_comment: Placeholder benchmark results. Replace with real training run outputs after ml/training/ scripts are complete.

models.name: LightGBM
models.notes: Winner. Best ROC-AUC and fastest inference. Tuned with 500 estimators, max_depth=7, num_leaves=63.

models.name: XGBoost
models.notes: Strong runner-up. ROC-AUC within 0.005 of LightGBM but ~4x slower training and ~2.5x slower inference. Tuned with 500 estimators, max_depth=6, eta=0.05.

models.name: CatBoost
models.notes: Competitive with XGBoost. Handles categorical features natively (card_type, ProductCD, device_type) without preprocessing. 1000 iterations, depth=6.

models.name: Logistic Regression
models.notes: Baseline. Significantly weaker on ROC-AUC (~0.10 gap) and PR-AUC. Fast training and near-zero inference latency. L2 regularization, C=0.01, scaled features.
